stemHtml: In a modern transport aircraft, what happens in the event of a total AC generator failure?

options.a: An emergency generator powered by the batteries produces 115 V AC for essential AC services.
options.b: A static inverter converts 24 V DC from the batteries to 115 V AC for essential AC services.
options.c: A static inverter converts 24 V DC from the batteries to 27 V AC for essential AC services.
options.d: A TRU converts 28 V DC to 115 V AC for essential AC services.
